headline: President and CEO @ DPAA | Industry Digital Leadership
summary:
With over 10 years of experience as the President and CEO of DPAA, the global trade and marketing association for the digital out of home (OOH) industry, I lead the organization's mission to drive awareness, value, and revenue for our members and partners. I oversee all aspects of the association's operations, strategy, and growth, reporting to a board of directors comprised of network owners and ad-tech companies.

I am passionate about evangelizing the digitization and transformation of the OOH industry, and helping our members and partners leverage the opportunities and challenges of the changing media landscape. I have spearheaded initiatives such as the Video Everywhere campaign, the Video Everywhere Summit, and the adoption of best practices and standards for mobile integration, location data, and programmatic buying. Under my leadership, DPAA has expanded its membership base, attracted global attention, and positioned OOH as the fastest growing and most innovative medium in the market.

experiences.title: President and CEO
experiences.description: Responsible for industry digital leadership and marketing. Oversee all P&L functions, reporting to BOD comprised of network owner and ad-tech companies.

experiences.title: Executive Vice President, Advanced Platform Sales
experiences.description: Oversaw transformation to digital ad sales. Built and ran advanced television, mobile and internet advertising businesses. Products include ITV/VOD Advertiser Channels, Addressable Advertising, Showcases, RFI products, mobile news, data, analytics and other digital ad sales products.

experiences.title: Partner
experiences.description: Designed and executed strategies at consulting practice for companies requiring business development, aggressive growth, sales training and market repositioning.  Clients: Advertising Council, Resorts Sports Network, Laureus Sports Awards, VOY Hispanic, CONCERT On-Demand, BOB-TV, and others.

experiences.title: Senior Vice President, Managing Director, Global Advertising Sales
Managing Director, International Sales and New Business Development
